Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,680,633Details
International Box Office $11,116,304
Worldwide Box Office $43,796,937
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,998,795
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,291,320
Total $12,290,115

Legs:2.65 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 29th, 2010 (Wide) by Walt Disney
Video Release: June 15th, 2010 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 For some suggestive content
(Rating bulletin 2074 (Cert #45475), 6/17/2009)
Running Time: 91 minutes
Geographical setting: Italy, New York, New York City, Rome, Italy
Plot point: Love Triangle, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay

Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Touchstone Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
